final:
module fan_speed_control (
    input [6:0] temp_reading,
    output reg [1:0] fan_speed
);

    always @(temp_reading) begin
        if (temp_reading < 7'd20) begin
            fan_speed <= 2'b01; // Low speed
        end else if (temp_reading >= 7'd20 && temp_reading <= 7'd30) begin
            fan_speed <= 2'b10; // Medium speed
        end else begin
            fan_speed <= 2'b11; // High speed
        end
    end
endmodule
